result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  ezpipeline [command] [options]

Options:
  --echo          Print command line arguments to output
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  append-zip                Append folder or file into existing .zip file
  cpu-info                  Get CPU info
  fetch-tool                Fetch tool (ninja, cmake, etc.)
  get-msbuild-property      Get property from msbuild file (*.csproj, *.props)
  git-height-version        Evaluate version from git height
  notify-discord            Send a notification message via WebHook
  notify-telegram           Send a notification message via Telegram Bot
  patch-dllimport           Patch dllimport in an assembly bytecode
  resolve-path              Resolve path
  set-msbuild-property      Set property in msbuild file (*.csproj, *.props)
  set-xml                   Set element or attribute value in xml document
  untgz                     Unarchive content of .tar.gz file
  untxz                     Unarchive content of .tar.xz file
  unzip                     Unarchive content of .zip file
  unzip-blob                Unarchive content of Azure Blob
  unzip-url                 Unarchive content of a web file
  vsenv                     Setup VisualStudio environment variables
  winsdkenv                 Setup WindowsSDK environment variables
  xcode-setbuildsystemtype  Patch XCode build system workspace property
  zip                       Archive folder into .zip file
  zip-to-blob               Archive folder into .zip Azure Blob

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:
  ezpipeline [command] [options]

Options:
  --echo          Print command line arguments to output
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  append-zip                Append folder or file into existing .zip file
  cpu-info                  Get CPU info
  fetch-tool                Fetch tool (ninja, cmake, etc.)
  get-msbuild-property      Get property from msbuild file (*.csproj, *.props)
  git-height-version        Evaluate version from git height
  notify-discord            Send a notification message via WebHook
  notify-telegram           Send a notification message via Telegram Bot
  patch-dllimport           Patch dllimport in an assembly bytecode
  resolve-path              Resolve path
  set-msbuild-property      Set property in msbuild file (*.csproj, *.props)
  set-xml                   Set element or attribute value in xml document
  untgz                     Unarchive content of .tar.gz file
  untxz                     Unarchive content of .tar.xz file
  unzip                     Unarchive content of .zip file
  unzip-blob                Unarchive content of Azure Blob
  unzip-url                 Unarchive content of a web file
  vsenv                     Setup VisualStudio environment variables
  winsdkenv                 Setup WindowsSDK environment variables
  xcode-setbuildsystemtype  Patch XCode build system workspace property
  zip                       Archive folder into .zip file
  zip-to-blob               Archive folder into .zip Azure Blob

result.stdout:
Description:
  Append folder or file into existing .zip file

Usage:
  ezpipeline append-zip [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input>                                                   Input folder
  -f, --filter <filter>                                                 Filter regex
  -o, --output <output>                                                 Output file
  -s, --subfolder <subfolder>                                           Output file subfolder
  -l, --compression-level <Fastest|NoCompression|Optimal|SmallestSize>  Compression level
  --echo                                                                Print command line arguments to output
  -?, -h, --help                                                        Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Fetch tool (ninja, cmake, etc.)

Usage:
  ezpipeline fetch-tool [options]

Options:
  -n, --name <AndroidSDKManager|Butler|CCache|Clang|CMake|Gradle|Ninja|None>  Tool name
  -o, --output <output>                                                       Output folder
  -t, --temp <temp>                                                           Temp folder or file name
  -v, --version <version>                                                     Version
  --overwrite                                                                 Overwrite files
  -p, --path                                                                  Add to PATH
  --echo                                                                      Print command line arguments to output
  -?, -h, --help                                                              Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Evaluate version from git height

Usage:
  ezpipeline git-height-version [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input>                Input file to evaluate height on
  -b, --base-version <base-version>  Base version
  -m, --main <main>                  Main branch regex
  -v, --variable <variable>          Environment variable to set
  --echo                             Print command line arguments to output
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information

  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Unarchive content of Azure Blob

Usage:
  ezpipeline unzip-blob [options]

Options:
  -o, --output <output>                    Output folder
  -f, --filter <filter>                    Filter regex
  -n, --blob-name <blob-name>              Output blob name
  --connection-string <connection-string>  Connection string
  -c, --container-name <container-name>    Container name
  -t, --temp <temp>                        Temp folder or file name
  --overwrite                              Overwrite files
  -r, --root-path <root-path>              Root path to skip
  --echo                                   Print command line arguments to output
  -?, -h, --help                           Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Archive folder into .zip Azure Blob

Usage:
  ezpipeline zip-to-blob [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input>                                                   Input folder
  -f, --filter <filter>                                                 Filter regex
  -n, --blob-name <blob-name>                                           Output blob name
  --connection-string <connection-string>                               Connection string
  -c, --container-name <container-name>                                 Container name
  -l, --compression-level <Fastest|NoCompression|Optimal|SmallestSize>  Compression level
  -t, --temp <temp>                                                     Temp folder or file name
  --overwrite                                                           Overwrite blob
  --echo                                                                Print command line arguments to output
  -?, -h, --help                                                        Show help and usage information
